name: passport_register
description: Register for a Maiat Passport — get a free ENS name (yourname.maiat.eth), on-chain ERC-8004 identity on Base, KYA verification code, and 10 Scarab bonus. Works for both AI agents and humans. Wallet is auto-created via Privy if not provided. Use when: you want a verifiable on-chain identity, need an ENS name for your agent, or want to participate in the Maiat trust network (vote, review, earn Scarab). Registration is free and gasless.

ensName.description: Desired ENS name (3+ chars, lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens). Will become ensName.maiat.eth

walletAddress.description: Optional 0x wallet address. If omitted, a Privy server wallet is created automatically for free.

type.description: Account type: 'agent' for AI agents (gets ERC-8004 + KYA), 'human' for people (ENS only). Default: agent

referredBy.description: Optional referrer ENS name (without .maiat.eth). Both parties get +5 Scarab bonus.

kyaCode.description: KYA verification code (e.g. MAIAT-4Y6V) — agents only

erc8004AgentId.description: On-chain ERC-8004 agent ID on Base — agents only

privyWalletCreated.description: Whether a new wallet was auto-created

isNew.description: True if newly registered, false if already existed
